title: ConstitutionAmendmentProposal
description: Schema for a proposed amendment to the seed constitution (.github/ai-policy/seed-constitution.md). Agents may draft proposals but may not self-approve — all amendments require explicit human approval. Aligned with seed-constitution.md §Amendment Process.

proposalId.description: Unique identifier for this amendment proposal (e.g. amend-2026-05-12-001).

section.description: Constitution section being targeted (e.g. '1. High-Risk Human-Required Boundaries').

ruleId.description: Identifier of the specific rule within the section (e.g. 'HUMAN_REQUIRED_SECRETS').

targetRule.description: Identifies the constitution rule this proposal targets.

type.description: Category of evidence motivating this amendment.

description.description: Summary of the evidence. Must be specific enough to verify.

sourceUrl.description: URL or reference to the evidence source.

evidence.description: Evidence justifying why this amendment is needed. At least one entry required.

action.description: Whether the rule is being added, modified, or removed.

currentText.description: Current rule text (required for modify and remove actions).

rationale.description: Why this change is the right solution.

proposedChange.description: The specific change proposed to the constitution.

description.description: What could go wrong if this amendment is adopted.

severity.description: Potential impact if the risk materializes.

risks.description: Identified risks of this amendment. At least one entry required.

guardrails.description: Guardrails to enforce if the amendment is adopted (e.g. 'require architecture-review role approval'). At least one required.

redTeamNotes.description: Adversarial analysis: how could this amendment be exploited or misused? Null if not yet performed.

humanApprovalRequired.description: Always true. No agent, worker, or automation may self-approve a constitution amendment. This field exists as an explicit invariant, not a configurable flag.

approvalStatus.description: Current approval status. Defaults to pending. Only a human constitutional owner may set approved or rejected.

approvedBy.description: Identity of the human approver (e.g. GitHub username).

approvedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the approval decision.

approvalRecord.description: Record of human approval. Null until approval or rejection.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this proposal was created.

capturedBy.description: Who drafted this proposal (e.g. human:taoyu, worker:constitution-steward).

relatedIssue.description: GitHub issue number motivating or tracking this amendment.
